title: [v3.2] Backport rootless cni fixes
body:
Backport https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10865, https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10936 and https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10939

Fixes https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1982762
Fixes https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1982593

Thanks for sending a pull request!

-->

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *Luap99* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
